blockers.description: Portainer auto-redeploy blocked by firewall (GitHub Actions IPs not whitelisted)
blockers.workaround: Manual PUT to https://194.242.35.77:9443/api/stacks/97?endpointId=3 with PullImage:true using Portainer API key from docs/CREDENTIALS.md

decisions.decision: Auth user created directly via SQL
decisions.rationale: No Supabase Admin UI access; GoTrue admin API returned errors

decisions.decision: postcss.config.mjs required for Tailwind v4 in production
decisions.rationale: next build uses webpack, not Turbopack; @tailwindcss/postcss not installed

context_notes: Phase 5 complete. App live, CSS working, login working. Phase 6 (Routing & Communication) not yet planned.
